visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The creator, a young woman with dark hair in two braids, stands in a brightly lit indoor hallway and opens a dark wooden door. She is wearing a white puff-sleeve top and a yellow pleated skirt, smiling directly at the camera. A fire safety sign is visible on the door. (2) The interior of a minimalist hotel room is revealed, featuring a large bed with white linens against light wood-paneled walls. A white desk with a small black lamp and a chair sit next to a window with green patterned curtains. (3) The woman sits in a light wood rocking chair with a colorful rainbow-striped cushion, closing her eyes in an expression of relaxation. A globe lamp on a side table provides soft warm lighting in the room. (4) A series of close-up shots show hotel amenities: white pillows neatly stacked on a wooden shelf and a hand touching the soft texture of white bed sheets. The lighting is bright and even. (5) The scene shifts to common living areas featuring colorful rugs, light wood shelving, and plush toys including monkeys and dogs sitting around a low table. The environment is spacious and designed in a typical Scandinavian style. (6) A montage of a breakfast buffet shows trays of sliced meats, baskets of assorted breads, a silver toaster, and large pots of scrambled eggs and meatballs. The setting is a clean, modern dining hall with white-tiled walls. (7) The woman is shown in various shots eating breakfast, including an open-faced sandwich with fish roe, meatballs, and eggs. She holds up a tube of Kalles caviar to the camera. The background shows other blurred hotel guests.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 全球只有一間. [Slogan]: IKEA Hotel 飯店開箱. (2) [Subtitle]: 色調和諧. [Variety]: (超素系!) 很有在家的感覺. (3) [Variety]: \ 舒服 / \ 舒服 /. (4) [Subtitle]: 不愧是很多高個子國家. [Subtitle]: 床&蓮蓬頭擺放都很高. (5) [Subtitle]: 實現了包下IKEA展示間的感覺. (6) [Variety]: 哇!. [Subtitle]: 二樓交誼廳. [Subtitle]: 一樓交誼廳. (7) [Subtitle]: 也很像展示間. (8) [Subtitle]: 在交誼廳泡泡麵. (9) [Subtitle]: 不管幾點睡一定要起來吃的飯店早餐. [Variety]: Buffet形式 ★整齊又乾淨好像模型★. (10) [Subtitle]: IKEA飯店必須要吃肉丸吧. (11) [Variety]: \ 哇 / \ 早餐 / 咩. (12) [Subtitle]: 瑞典國民食物. (13) [Variety]: 滿重口的. (14) [Variety]: 意義不明.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator, approximately 3 blurred guests in the dining background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair in two long braids, wearing a white off-shoulder puff-sleeve top and a yellow pleated skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: IKEA Hotel room with minimalist furniture, light wood panels, common areas with plush toys and colorful rugs, and a bright white-tiled buffet dining hall.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice introduces the video over an upbeat, 120 BPM electronic pop track. The audio is bright and clear. (2) A sharp 'mechanical click' sound triggers as the hotel door opens. The narrator continues with high vocal arousal and dynamic intonation. (3) A 'pop' bubble sound effect marks the transition to the rocking chair scene. The music remains a consistent rhythmic bed. (4) Distinct 'crunch' and 'rustle' sounds (incidental noise) occur during a food montage, synchronized with the narrator describing the Swedish breakfast. (5) A comical 'wow' sound effect and a stylized 'sheep bleat' SFX are used for emphasis during the dining segment. (6) The video concludes with the narrator's voice maintaining a high valence and positive tone as the background music reaches its loop point and ends with a hard cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Room Tour -> Common Areas -> Breakfast Review -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an experiential review and unboxing of the unique IKEA Hotel in Sweden, showcasing its interior design, facilities, and breakfast buffet to travel and lifestyle enthusiasts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of the brand, tour of the hotel premises, and review of branded food products like Kalles.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced social-media style vlog with dense text overlays and sound effects, effectively promoting the IKEA brand's hospitality venture.
